title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access the Colossus GPU cluster. The video argues that Anthropic lacks vertical integration compared to competitors, relying on external partners for chips and infrastructure, and that the AI race is shifting toward control of hardware and datacenters rather than benchmarks alone.
